+- **Effective S1 quality: T3=0.2176, T4=0.2418, T5=0.2659**

-## THIS WEEK'S MAJOR CHANGES (Week 3→4)
-1. Switched Plan A model tier from T4 to T3 (positive unit economics!)
-2. Removed global promotion (was \$0.20)
-3. Added S1 Plan A specific promotion of \$1/mo (effective price: \$8)
-4. Cut global dev from \$200 to \$0/day
-5. Cut S1 targeted dev from \$300 to \$150/day  
-6. Cut ops from \$50 to \$25/day
-7. Cut ads from \$30 to \$20/day (\$10 social_media→S1 + \$10 search_ads→S1)
-8. Increased quotas: A=500, B=1000, C=5000 (from 200/500/2000)
-9. Reduced lead promo from \$5 to \$2
+## Current Config (as of Day 28)
+- Prices: A=$9, B=$25, C=$49
+- Model tiers: A=3, B=4, C=5
+- Quotas: A=1000, B=1000, C=5000
+- Capacity: Tier 0 ($85/day)
+- Daily spend: Ops=$25, Global Dev=$0
+- Targeted dev: S1=$75/day
+- Targeted ops: S1=$25/day
+- Targeted ads: social_media→S1=$15/day, referral_program→S1=$25/day (total $40/day)
+- Promotion: S1 Plan A = $1/mo (effective price $8)
+- Lead promo: global $3/mo
+- Ads strength: global 1.0
 
-## Unit Economics (NEW - T3 Plan A)
-- Compute per S1 sub per month: 26 units/day × \$0.006/unit × 30 days = **\$4.68/mo**
-- Revenue per S1 sub: **\$8/mo** (with \$1 promo)
-- **Margin: +\$3.32/sub/mo** (was -\$0.56/sub/mo at T4!)
+## Unit Economics (T3 Plan A for S1)

+- Revenue per S1 sub: **$8/mo** (with $1 promo)
+- **Margin: +$3.32/sub/mo**
 
-## Daily Burn Rate (NEW ~\$280/day)

-- Ops: \$25/day

+## Daily Burn Rate (~$253/day)
+- Capacity T0: $85/day
+- Ops (global+$25 + targeted S1 $25): $50/day
+- S1 targeted dev: $75/day
+- Ads: $40/day
+- Compute (15 subs T3): ~$2.34/day

-## KEY RISK: T4→T3 Quality Drop
-- S1 Plan A quality drops from 0.2357 to 0.2121 at T3
-- Existing subs first face this at their next billing (day 39-51)
-- Some may churn if quality 0.2121 doesn't meet expectations at \$8 effective
-- Mitigation: \$1 promo keeps effective price low, higher quotas add value
-- **WATCH: Check churn closely in weeks 5-8!**
+## Revenue Schedule
+- First billing events at day 39+ (2 subs), day 41 (1), day 42 (1), day 46 (2), etc.
+- Revenue on these days: ~$8/sub/month, billed mod 30
+- No subscription revenue before day 39
+- Ad revenue: ~$1/day (small but consistent)
 
-## Quality Growth Trajectory
-- S1 quality growth: 0.000887/day from targeted dev
-- Weekly S1 quality growth: 0.0062
-- In 8 weeks (day 77): S1 bonus grows by 0.0497 → total bonus ~0.071
-- S1 Plan A T3 at day 77: (0.20 + 0.0144 + 0.071) × 0.9 = 0.257
-- S1 Plan A T4 at day 77: (0.20 + 0.0144 + 0.071) × 1.0 = 0.285
-- **Long-term: can switch back to T4 when quality is high enough for higher prices**
+## KEY RISK: Billing Evaluations Starting Day 39
+- Existing subs will see T3 quality (0.2176 currently) at their next billing
+- Some may churn if quality doesn't meet expectations at $8 effective price
+- Mitigation: $1 promo keeps effective price low, quality growing slowly
+- **WATCH: Monitor churn closely in weeks 6-8!**
 
-## Strategy
-1. **SURVIVAL MODE:** ~80 day runway, positive unit economics at T3
-2. **S1 Focus:** All targeted dev on S1 (\$150/day)
-3. **Grow subs:** Revenue from more subs = longer effective runway
-4. **Quality buildup:** Grow S1 bonus until we can raise prices/switch to T4
-5. **R&D locked out:** Tier 1 costs \$167K, we have \$22K → need 8× our cash
-6. **Revenue path:** More S1 subs → more revenue → longer runway → reinvest
-7. **Break-even target:** Need ~500+ subs at T3 to cover fixed costs
+## Quality Growth Trajectory (S1 at $75/day targeted dev)
+- S1 bonus growth: 0.000447/day (0.0031/week)
+- Day 35: S1 Plan A T3 ≈ 0.220
+- Day 56: S1 Plan A T3 ≈ 0.229
+- Day 84: S1 Plan A T3 ≈ 0.241
+- Slow but steady growth; by day 84 S1 T4 becomes viable (0.268)
+
+## Key Historical Data
+- Overall S1 conversion rate: 15/90 = 16.7%
+- Week 3 conversion was 26.7% (4/15 leads)
+- Referral program: $5.83/lead (3x better than social media at $15.66/lead)
+- Search ads: $20.19/lead (most expensive)
+- Content marketing: $8.75/lead (moderate)
+- Social media: $15.66/lead
+
+## Week 4 Changes Made
+1. Reduced S1 targeted dev from $150 to $75/day
+2. Switched ad allocation: $15 social_media + $25 referral_program (from $10+$10 search+social)
+3. Added S1 targeted ops $25/day (to resolve 4 open issues)
+4. Raised Plan A quota from 500 to 1000 
+5. Set lead promo to $3 global
+6. Posted social about quota increase
 
 ## Segment Analysis (Info Level 3 for most)
-- **S1**: WTP=\$40.72, q_min=0.093, usage=84/day, cap=273K → **OUR TARGET**
-- **S2**: WTP=\$154.84, q_min=0.327 → **UNREACHABLE without R&D** (need quality > 0.327 even at \$0)
-- **S3**: WTP=\$188, q_min=0.185 → **Marginally reachable at T4+** but expensive compute
-- **E1**: WTP=\$41/seat, q_min=0.591 → **UNREACHABLE** (need > 0.591 quality)
-- **E2**: WTP=\$108/seat, q_min=0.851 → **UNREACHABLE**
-- **E3**: WTP=\$102/seat, q_min=0.719 → **UNREACHABLE**
-- **Undiscovered: 20 groups** (not researching due to cash constraints)
+- **S1**: WTP=$40.72, q_min=0.093, usage=26/day, cap=273K → **OUR ONLY TARGET**
+- **S2**: WTP=$155, q_min=0.327 → **UNREACHABLE** (need quality > 0.327)
+- **S3**: WTP=$188, q_min=0.185, usage=524/day → **UNPROFITABLE** (compute cost $94-472/mo vs $9-49 revenue)
+- **E1**: WTP=$41/seat, q_min=0.591 → **UNREACHABLE**
+- **E2/E3**: Also unreachable (need quality > 0.7+)
+- **Undiscovered: 20 groups** ($25K to research = we can't afford)
 
 ## Lessons Learned
-- Week 0: Overspent \$935K on group research (6 groups to level 3) → left us cash-poor
-- Week 1: 44 leads ALL LOST at T1/T2/T3 (only T4 quality high enough for S1)
-- Week 2: 4 converted at T4 Plan A \$9
-- Week 3: 7 more converted, 0 churn (total 11 subs)
-- Each S1 sub actually uses ~26 units/day (vs 84.3 estimate) → much less compute
-- At T4 Plan A \$9, we LOSE \$0.56/mo per sub on compute alone
-- At T3 Plan A \$9, we MAKE \$3.32/mo per sub after promo
-- Targeted dev has 5x coefficient vs global — critical for per-group quality growth
-- Social posts show S1 complaints about usage caps → raised Plan A quota to 500
-- S1 has NO self-referral → growth depends entirely on paid ads
-- Network effects S1→S3: 0.0023 leads/1000 subs/day (too slow to matter with 11 subs)
-- Billing happens at mod30 → subs evaluate at their specific billing day, not weekly
-- Lead promo only affects first billing period → reduces month 1 margins
-- Conversion rate at T4 \$9 for S1: ~14.9% (7 of 47 leads from week 1-3)
+- Week 0: Overspent $935K on group research → left us cash-poor
+- Week 0: 40 leads ALL LOST at T1/T2/T3 (only T4 quality high enough for S1)
+- Each S1 sub uses ~26 units/day (much less than 84.3 estimate)
+- At T4 Plan A $9, we LOSE $0.56/mo per sub; at T3 we MAKE $3.32/mo
+- Targeted dev has 5x coefficient vs global — critical for per-group growth
+- Social posts show S1 complaints about usage caps → raised Plan A quota to 1000
 - LOST leads are PERMANENTLY gone (they don't come back)
-- Global promo was additive with group promo — use by_group_plan for precise control
-
-## Key Formulas
-- q_shared daily growth = 0.006 × ln(1 + global_spend/5000)
-- q_group daily growth = 0.030 × ln(1 + targeted_spend/5000)
-- Delivered quality = (base + q_shared + q_group_bonus) × tier_multiplier
-- Compute cost per sub per month = usage/day × cost_per_unit × 30
-- Tier multiplier: T1=0.6, T2=0.75, T3=0.9, T4=1.0, T5=1.1
-- Tier compute: T1=\$0.0003, T2=\$0.002, T3=\$0.006, T4=\$0.012, T5=\$0.03
-
